title: Add WGX quick and full validation receipts
goal: Extend the existing wgx validate front door with quick and full profiles plus stable JSON receipts, while delegating actual checks to repository-native validation commands instead of duplicating CI logic.

acceptance.assertion: The implementation evolves wgx validate rather than introducing a competing wgx verify or repo-wide duplicate command family.
A quick profile targets bounded agent feedback and a full profile targets merge-grade local validation; repositories may declare unsupported or CI-only checks explicitly.
WGX invokes declared repository-native commands such as make, just, cargo, pytest or npm front doors and does not reimplement their test semantics.
JSON output records repository, commit, dirty state, profile, invoked checks, durations, result, skipped checks, environment identity and receipt hash.
At least three representative core repositories prove deterministic command discovery, timeout behavior, redaction and green/red receipt output.
